summary: A simple note-taking application allowing users to create, save, and retrieve notes.

entities.name: Note
entities.description: A single note created by a user.
properties: noteId (ID): Unique identifier for the note.
userId (ID): Identifier of the user who created the note.
content (String): The text content of the note.
createdAt (Timestamp): Timestamp of when the note was created.
updatedAt (Timestamp): Timestamp of when the note was last updated.

entities.name: User
entities.description: Represents a user of the application.
properties: userId (ID): Unique identifier for the user.

user_flows.name: Create Note
steps: User enters a title and content for the note.
App saves the note with a unique ID, associating it with the user.

user_flows.name: Save Note
steps: User modifies the title or content of an existing note.
App updates the note with the new content and updates the 'updatedAt' timestamp.

user_flows.name: Retrieve Note
user_flows.description: User retrieves a previously saved note.
steps: User selects a note from a list or searches for a note.
App displays the title and content of the selected note.

user_flows.name: List Notes
user_flows.description: User views a list of their notes.
steps: User navigates to the notes list view.
App displays a list of notes, potentially with titles and brief previews.

pages.name: Note List Page
pages.description: Displays a list of the user's notes.
elements: List of note titles (linked to note view page)

pages.name: Note View Page
pages.description: Displays the content of a single note.

pages.name: Note Creation Page
pages.description: Page for creating a new note.

technical_requirements: Unique ID generation for notes and users.
User authentication (if multiple users are supported).
Timestamping for note creation and updates.
API endpoints for creating, saving, retrieving, and listing notes.
